constraints.ocl:
context Tag
inv: self.posts->forAll(x | x.isPublic <> true)

context Membership
inv: (self.group <> null) and (self.role <> null)

context Group
inv: self.memberships->any(x | x.role <> '') <> null

context Conversation
inv: self.participants->any(x | x.email <> '') <> null

context User
inv: self.posts->any(x | x.isPublic <> false) <> null

context Comment
inv: (self.createdAt <> null) and (self.text <> null)

context Post
inv: (self.reactions->forAll(x | x.createdAt <> '')) and (not(self.reactions->forAll(x | x.createdAt <> '')))

context Message
inv: ((self.sender <> null) and (self.isRead = true)) and (not((self.sender <> null) and (self.isRead = true)))

context Tag
inv: (self.posts->collect(x | x.comments)->size() >= 3) and (not(self.posts->collect(x | x.comments)->size() >= 3))
